twitch_info.title: I wanna kill the kamilia 3 v2.02 - The Journey to 100% (Beaten K3 v1.50 100%)

message.body: I know I'm not ready for real runs yet but eh why not pick it up
amazing how much I've improved on sunspike screen 1 ngl
clearly out of practice on screen 2 tho
there is zero way I'm beating this until my time off work lol
I'm a lot better than I thought I was
I did not think I'd make it to tempest with this many lives
I'm clearly a bit rusty today as well, but in a different way than usual
the "its starting to click" kind of rusty
Gtg now, hope the stream goes well! :D /
that was my fastest past black ever
holy FUCK was that a fast hades screen 1
Hello how much lives you has at the start?
that was a really good attempt wow
honestly all of them stage 1 -4 are not that bad to get
Clear that is impossible to me incluse with infinite lives :/
i have all of them genesi2Happy
ye I'm only missing s4 golden now
I'm probably like 18+ hours into grinding this already
ye this shit is hard for melmao
i did 3 streams if i remember right
I've probably done loads now, didn't keep track
so it must be like 5-7 hours maybe
I think I've done like 5-6 streams or smth
that are like all 6+ hours long
yeee this is a hard one
i was just practicing hades hard to not lose a ton of deaths that's it
once you have enough practice in to get past skill issue
okay why the F am I coinstantly failing this corner
it really is been good at hades
I always forget how to get out
I cleared kamirin remake that is a high 60 game :)
second trying this save earlier and now not is funny
had an attempt nearly clear hades screen 2 with golden crystal earlier today
failing the easy bit of this save is annoying lol
\o/ is having two hands in the air
I can't quite remember what the meaning is cause I intuitively understand it. It is a positive meaning though.
i imagine it as goku spirit bomb
but it can also be solair praise the sun
the actual meaning I think is something like "yay" / celebratory in nature
but yeah. person with both arms raised. like a YAAAYY celebration pose
^^^ yeah that's what I was trying to get out ty raker :)
so glad this game doesn't have me do stages deathless like "I wanna Classic 100%" forced me to
Question who is the powerful character of fiction?
oh if you mean of all fiction then that's a hard question due to all the different stories made
technically a definitive answer is impossible
theres a whole power scaling wiki dedicated to attempting categorization of fictional characters
nah isn't goku like always better than beerus in the end lol
But saitama is better than goku
Since he kill goku in one punch dont letting him transformate
Zeno or one above all who strongest?
The one above all is strongest?
ok but bugs bunny would simply never let it go to a real fight
I NEARLY first tried sunspike screen 2 what the fuck?!
a shame how much lives I'm losing now compared to my almost first try lol
The presence or the one above all who strongest?
holy shit I'm out of sunspike with good lives xd
yeah probably not gfoing to make it
this is literally the hardest save in hades
11 lives on dotkid, not happening lol.
but yeah for real this could've been the run
if not for save 1 of hades screen 2
I am definitely able to get stage 4 golden now
the dotkid actually overlays in front of the crystal
yeah zero doubts Ican win this now
just gotta get a good run out of sunspike to have another attempt which is tricky
yea the start is tricky with sunspike
I had a really good PB at least
182 lives on hades screen 2 but had 11 by dotkid
all of that was due to save 1
yea about 200 to hades is good
I had more than that in hades screen 1
hades over 200 is an real attempt to clear
yeah as I said it was literally only save 1 of screen 2 that ruined it
if not for that save it was a real attempt
I can be very gooda t this screen at random
and then just not at all
i always had a limit of 275 out of sunspike to start a run
holy shit, in my run with those lives to hades...
I was out of sunspike with 292 lives...
Ididn't evendo that many that time though
this game doesn't require under a certain time as well as deaths like timemachine 2 does
its a good game I was really good at, at one point
I am planning to go back to it to try and get lunatic WR at some point
my practice is finally paying off
I hate messing up on this screen
but i like the nerfs in this version
2 less lives in tempest than my previous best run
this has a real shot then
every run will be like this now
I like excursion screen 2 being nerfed
but the nerfmakes it so much less boring
but that one I can get behind xD
this is the only tempest save I'm very shaky on
it is sometimes a shitty save
so its just this until hades that's a problem
this is the only tempest sav where I'm always afraid of game overing on
defo wil have less lives on hades this time
the worst I've done on butterfly all day, shame
yeah this run is dead imo
usually beat this screen in 2-4 deaths total
everything over 200 is good and than its a coin flip anyways
yeah this ledge is gonna end the run
one stuck can end it in hades
I  need a run where both this and ledge go right
been good at hades is the key to success here
yeah the ledge is get lucky for sure
the other save is just skill issue
you can get pretty good at it there is a setup but yea
hades is basically the rz of stage 4
at least stage 4 has no guy tower equivalent
well it sorta does with tempest but not really
not that it really mattered to me
cause I'm pretty decent at guy tower
turns out my guy tower crystal skill absolutely translated
when I was doing runs so
well stage 3 as a whole wasn't easy, it took me ages of practice to actually do it
but RZ was the real problem
i love how stage 4 is the exact same story as stage 3 basically
cause my tempest crystal skill absolutely translates to the tempest bit
which is why the pre-final save I struggle with, because that wasn't part of crystal
we still talking about k3 nothing is easy
ye even for good players nothing is easy lol
it'll feel surreal when I finally reach it
which tbf I'm not THAT far away
s4 golden, then ex dotkid remake (cause it feels wrong not to) then tomo area then ouka area
and that's it time for ex m-stage
and than you here lifted telling you speedruns 100% possible soon
lifted tech is the only person around currently skilled enough to do a 100% run of K3
i still didnt even beat it
lifted hasn't done ex m-stage yet tho
considering the fact he's so close to that sub 2 any% clear
I wish I were that skilled lol
lifted will end up playing abd eating ex m-stage two times over before I beat it probably, maybe more
and that's not including my practice save which I factor in
getting a run started is pain
I'm glad the game starts with sunspike rather than putting it later in the stage though
yeah I think I'm done tonight, my skill has taken a very definite nose dive this evening.
